title: Our Children, Our Future: Tackling Child Poverty
body: " Please note that further accessible formats will be published on this page in due course. We have published this paper ahead of all accessible versions to put detailed information about measures aimed at reducing child poverty in the public domain at the earliest opportunity, although the production of accessible versions requires additional time.   The Child Poverty Strategy sets out how government will deliver on its commitment to tackle child poverty and give children the best start in life across the UK. Shortly after the election, the Prime Minister set up the Child Poverty Taskforce to bring together government and experts who were tasked with exploring how government could use all its available levers to drive down child poverty.  This document sets out how government, working with others, will go about tackling the root causes and alleviate the symptoms of child poverty in this parliament and beyond.  "
